purpose: Verify CST upload merge boundary risks: baseline watermark and duplicate normalized keys.

baseline.rule: Only merge active upload slots with ky > baselineCoveredKy; current baseline 05.2026 therefore merges 06.2026. If future baseline is re-dumped with later source_from_date, slots <= that ky are skipped to avoid double-count.

duplicateKeyCheck.normalizedKey: normIit(iit_code) + '|' + normUnit(unit_code/unit_name), where normUnit uses 3-digit prefix and maps 001.BVĐK Đồng Nai-KHU C to 001.BVĐK Đồng Nai
duplicateKeyCheck.conclusion: No current CST baseline key would receive the same upload qty more than once. Guard added: if a future baseline key has >1 CST row, upload merge is skipped for that key pending explicit allocation.
